calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Continued To Jul-19-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing Of Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Apr-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Marc T. Cefalu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CLAAS Financial Services,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Kevin Sallabedra,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $77,009.97
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $3049.50
Costs: $688.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $80,747.97

Judgment of possession for plaintiff of the equipment described in Exhibit A. To the extent the equipment is recovered and sold, defendant will be entitled to a credit for the net proceeds.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-19-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing Of Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Continued To Feb-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
